title: Unnamed Create Computers Resource Pack
description: A combination of Create: ComputerCraft by End_Rage and Unnamed CC Resource Pack by Soumeh with a pinch of my personal touch.
body:
A combination of [Create: ComputerCraft](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/create-computercraft/versions) by End_Rage and [Unnamed CC Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/uccrp/versions) by Soumeh with a pinch of my personal touch. You're free to edit and re-post this but please credit the original creators and me.

![Computers, Turtles, Modems, Cables, Monitors, Redstone Relay, Floppy Disk, Speaker, Printed Papers and Book.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bdc252a53a1cd4a4892504df7b31b921b2c6a02d.png)
